x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CMDB normalization standardizes CI names across discovery sources. Without it, the same physical asset appears under multiple distinct names and Now Assist entity resolution splits AI context across duplicate CI representations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Schedule CMDB normalization jobs via All > Configuration > CMDB > Normalization > Scheduled Jobs. Ensure jobs run at least weekly. Without normalization, the same physical asset may appear under multiple names, splitting Now Assist AI context across duplicate CI representations.
